kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is On Login Page
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Username And Valid Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And User Clicks The Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Success Message
Get Success Message Text
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${message} = You logged into a secure area! ×
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.msg: ${message} = You logged into a secure area! ×

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: And User Should Be Redirected To Secure Area
kw.msg: No keyword with name 'And User Should Be Redirected To Secure Area' found. Did you mean: keywords.Then User Should Be Redirected To Secure Area
kw.status: No keyword with name 'And User Should Be Redirected To Secure Area' found. Did you mean: keywords.Then User Should Be Redirected To Secure Area

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: No keyword with name 'And User Should Be Redirected To Secure Area' found. Did you mean: keywords.Then User Should Be Redirected To Secure Area

test.name: TC_002 Failed Login With Incorrect Password

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is On Login Page
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: When User Enters Valid Username And Invalid Password
Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: And User Clicks The Login Button
Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Then User Should See Error Message For Invalid Password
Get Error Message Text
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'css=.flash.error' did not appear in 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'css=.flash.error' did not appear in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.status: Element 'css=.flash.error' did not appear in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Should Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

kw.status: Element 'css=.flash.error' did not appear in 5 seconds.

kw.name: And User Should Remain On Login Page
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Element 'css=.flash.error' did not appear in 5 seconds.

test.name: TC_003 Failed Login With Incorrect Username

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Given User Is On Login Page
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

Get Error Message Text
Wait Until Page Contains Element

kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.status: Element 'css=.flash.error' did not appear in 5 seconds.

kw.name: And User Should Remain On Login Page
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.status: Element 'css=.flash.error' did not appear in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
